Are you empty? Is your life so full, even in service, that there is no room for God? I've been there, trading busyness for holiness. Remember these jars. Used every day for ritual washing, but now empty for the Lord's purpose.  Are you empty?

-Sean Lennon
Interview Text:
Chris S.

(part 3)

Chris also told us he had just discovered the best speaker he had ever heard. He said his name was Bob and that he lived his life doing amazing things. 

As he described him more I said, "Oh, is it Bob Goff?" Chris said "Yes!"

Bob Goff is a personality that I first found out about in Donald Miller's book, Blue like Jazz. He really is someone who does amazing things. 

So we looked up one of his talks online and has a somewhat similar way he hears God. He said his handicap is that he just doesn't hear the voice of God, so instead he listens to what pains him. What lights him up. And then he does something about it. 

Maybe we don't have to hear God's voice as much as we do listen to the intuition and call we feel inside of us. Perhaps God has naturally given us the tools to do his will in the world.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine if God's love for us, and ours for him was like this.
